name: Shrimp Scampi
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell all the shrimp.
2. Place the butter and olive oil into a large skillet and melt over medium-high heat.
3. Crush the garlic into the pan and stir it around, keeping it moving.
4. Add the shrimp to the skillet and continue stirring until they turn from translucent to white or pink. Remove from the heat. Do not overcook them.
5. Sprinkle parsley on top as a garnish. Serve over white rice or pasta.
